tagline: Automated video editing tools for content creators
description: AutoStream is a SaaS platform that helps content creators automate their video editing workflow using AI-powered tools. We support YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, and other major creator platforms.

policies.details: No refunds are issued after 7 days from the subscription date. Refunds within 7 days are processed in 5–7 business days.
24/7 support is available exclusively on the Pro plan. Basic plan users have access to email support during business hours.
A 7-day free trial is available for the Pro plan. No credit card required to start.
You can cancel your subscription at any time. Access continues until the end of the billing period.

faqs.question: Can I upgrade from Basic to Pro?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can upgrade at any time. The price difference is prorated for the remaining days in your billing cycle.

faqs.question: What video formats are supported?
faqs.answer: AutoStream supports MP4, MOV, AVI, and MKV for import, and exports in MP4 (H.264/H.265).

faqs.question: Is there a free plan?
faqs.answer: We don't offer a permanent free plan, but you can try the Pro plan free for 7 days.
